summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Firebase Google Authentication migration (iteration 3). All 39 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: landing page renders correctly, Sign in triggers Firebase popup (not Emergent auth redirect), AuthCallback removed, api.js uses Firebase ID token interceptor.
test_credentials: Firebase ID tokens generated via custom token exchange. Test users: test-uid-001 (test1@planmate.local), test-uid-002 (test2@planmate.local). API Key: AIzaSyDiEygXj9X-DWauVLIvA-Dw9A_saY9zTG4
seed_data_creation: Created Firebase test users via firebase-admin SDK. MongoDB users created automatically via _get_or_create_user on first auth/me call.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Firebase auth migration complete. Old session-based auth (Emergent) fully replaced. Test file test_firebase_auth.py uses real Firebase ID tokens via custom token exchange. Legacy email-match migration tested and working. All CRUD routes work with Firebase Bearer token. User isolation preserved.

auth_endpoints: GET /api/auth/me with valid Firebase ID token → 200 with user fields (user_id, firebase_uid, email, name, profile_type, theme, created_at)
First-time valid token creates MongoDB user with firebase_uid
Second call with same token returns same user_id (no duplicate)
user_profile: PATCH /api/user/profile with valid token updates profile_type
PATCH /api/user/profile with valid token updates theme
crud_with_firebase_auth: Tasks CRUD (create, list, update, delete) with Firebase Bearer token
Subjects CRUD with Firebase Bearer token
Exams CRUD with Firebase Bearer token
Clients CRUD with Firebase Bearer token
Time-logs CRUD with Firebase Bearer token
Payments CRUD with Firebase Bearer token
Ideas CRUD with Firebase Bearer token
Platforms CRUD with Firebase Bearer token
Dashboard stats with Firebase Bearer token
user_isolation: Tasks created by user A not visible to user B
legacy_migration: Legacy user with matching email but no firebase_uid gets linked (firebase_uid added to existing user doc)
frontend: Landing page renders with 'Plan your week' hero text
No automatic OAuth redirect to auth.emergentagent.com
Clicking 'Sign in' triggers Firebase signInWithPopup (popup URL: planmate-a0b51.firebaseapp.com)
AuthCallback page removed (route redirects to landing)
No hash-based session_id handling in App.js
api.js has Authorization Bearer interceptor using currentUser.getIdToken()
